items.name_en: 🌸❄️Chanel Gabrielle Chanel's innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, this Chanel Gabrielle Travel Bag was born 💯. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its presence has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. Delicate and soft bag body with hard and structured bottom fully embodies Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. size:28cm

items.name_cn:
Chane1 ❄️ Letter Weave Flap Bag | Luxurious and High-End AS4808
The gorgeous metal woven handle, dotted with shimmering rhinestones, is simply beautiful. The petite body exudes an exquisite yet luxurious charm. The classic black reveals a premium texture. It perfectly matches various outfits with a casual carry. Every bag is a carefully crafted work of art. I love this simple yet sophisticated beauty~ The perfect size is versatile and practical.
Size: 13×19×5.5cm
